title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
